untranslatable_reason: Signal requires COT (Commitment of Traders) report data which is not available in the allowed indicators list. COT positioning metrics (commercials buying/selling, funds entering, public sentiment) cannot be mapped to price-based technical indicators. The signal specifically relies on: (1) commercial trader positioning, (2) fund accumulation patterns, and (3) public participation sentiment — none of which are available in the provided indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted partial proxy using RSI extremes (>70 for extreme bullishness) and volume acceleration, but this does NOT capture the core signal logic which depends on COT report analysis. Original signal cannot be adequately translated without access to COT data feeds.
